description_long: This is a pair of high-top Adidas sneakers in a deep red colorway, displayed atop a matching Adidas-branded shoebox. The shoes feature a combination of smooth and textured synthetic materials, with prominent Adidas three-stripe branding on the sides and a large Adidas trefoil logo on the tongue and heel. The laces are arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the shoes have padded collars and ankle straps for added support. The outsoles are white with a subtle circular tread pattern, and the midsoles are slightly raised for cushioning. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for streetwear or casual athletic use.
description: A pair of red Adidas high-top sneakers with white soles, Adidas branding, and a matching shoebox. The shoes feature textured synthetic materials, criss-cross lacing, and padded ankle support.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing Adidas branding on the tongue, three stripes on the side, and the shoes resting on a branded box.
description_view_1: Rear and sole view highlighting the Adidas trefoil logo on the heel, the circular tread pattern on the white outsole, and the 'Substance Painter' branding on the box.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the padded collars, heel logos, and the rear profile of both shoes atop the box.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the full length of the shoes, the three stripes, and the overall silhouette with the box beneath.
attribute_logo: White Adidas trefoil logo on the tongue and heel, white 'adidas' text on the tongue, all in white against red background.
